title: Pack of 8 Premium White Silver Floral Christmas Crackers - 12.5" Metallic Festive Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations - Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: Elevate your Christmas table setting with this box of eight premium crackers, each featuring a winter floral design on grey board with shiny silver hotstamp and elegant silver satin ribbon.
Measuring 12.5 inches, each cracker includes a paper hat, a festive motto or joke, a snap for that classic holiday pop, and a high-quality, practical gift inside.
Surprise gifts include a phone holder, phone stylus, mini screwdriver set, photo frame, bracelet, comb, shoehorn, or nail clippers—ideal for guests of all ages.
The set comes with eight matching place cards tucked behind the cracker tray, allowing for personalised seating and a beautifully organised Christmas dining experience.
Crafted with sustainability in mind, both the crackers and packaging are fully recyclable and plastic-free, offering a stylish yet eco-friendly option for your holiday celebrations.
description: Product Description Premium Christmas Crackers Celebrate in style with Harvey & Mason Premium Christmas Crackers, expertly crafted to bring elegance, sparkle, and festive fun to your table. Each set offers a luxurious design, classic tradition, and joyful surprises for family and friends to enjoy this holiday season. Premium Crackers for Unforgettable Festive Moments Red Holly Robin 12.5" Crackers Add festive charm to your celebrations with these Red Holly Robin Christmas Crackers. Beautifully designed with classic holly and robin motifs, each cracker brings tradition, fun, and a joyful surprise to your holiday table. Green Tree 12.5" Crackers Bring festive elegance to your table with these Green Tree Christmas Crackers. Featuring a traditional tree design, each cracker adds sparkle, joy, and a classic touch of holiday cheer, complete with fun surprises inside for family and friends. Tradition and Elegance at Your Christmas Table Gold White Holly 12.5" Crackers Elevate your festive table with these Gold White Holly Christmas Crackers. Showcasing a timeless holly design in elegant gold and white, each cracker delivers sparkle, tradition, and joyful surprises for a memorable holiday celebration. Winter Floral 12.5" Crackers Add a touch of seasonal elegance with these Winter Floral Christmas Crackers. Decorated with delicate festive florals, each cracker brings style, sparkle, and joyful surprises to your holiday table, perfect for celebrating with family and friends. Which Christmas Cracker Suits Your Festive Style? Red White Joy 12.5" Crackers Celebrate the season in style with these Red White Joy Christmas Crackers. Featuring a festive design in bold red and white, each cracker adds cheer, tradition, and fun surprises to your holiday table, making every gathering extra special. Tree Scene 12.5" Crackers Bring festive magic to your table with these Tree Scene Christmas Crackers. Featuring a charming woodland tree design, each cracker combines tradition, sparkle, and joyful surprises to make your holiday celebrations truly memorable.
